name: bork
description: General development tools for coding workflows

interface.shortDescription: General development tools for coding workflows
interface.longDescription: General development tools for Codex projects, including reusable skills for commit writing, SQL formatting, plan writing, humanizing text, and trimming agent instructions, plus supporting agents and commands already used in this repository.
defaultPrompt: Write a commit message for these staged changes
Review this SQL and reformat it to project style
Trim redundant instructions from this AGENTS.md
